meta.title: PromoClock — Claude Code Weekly Limits +50% (Through July 13, 2026)
meta.description: Claude Code weekly limits are up 50% — live now through July 13, 2026 for Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Enterprise. Stacks with the 2x 5-hour limits boost.
meta.ogTitle: Claude Code weekly limits are up 50% through July 13, 2026
meta.ogDescription: Live now for Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Enterprise — across CLI, IDE extensions, desktop and web. Nothing to opt into. Stacks with the 2x 5-hour limit increase.

hero.title: Claude Code weekly limits are up 50% — through July 13, 2026.
hero.subtitle: Live now for all Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Enterprise users. Applies everywhere you use Claude Code — CLI, IDE extensions, desktop and the web. Nothing to opt into; it's already on your account. Stacks with the 2x increase to 5-hour limits announced May 6.
hero.sourceLabel: Announced by Anthropic / Claude Developers, May 13, 2026.

eligibility.title: WHO BENEFITS
eligibility.subtitle: The +50% weekly limit boost is applied automatically to these Claude Code plans.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: Weekly Sonnet and Opus hours increase by ~50% through July 13. No action needed — already applied to your account.

plans.name: Max (5x)
plans.description: Weekly Opus pool +50%; Sonnet effectively unconstrained for normal workloads.

plans.name: Max (20x)
plans.description: Weekly Opus pool +50% — well beyond realistic full-time usage for most developers.

plans.name: Team
plans.description: Shared team pool gains +50% — same logic as Max, distributed across seats.

plans.name: Enterprise (seat-based)
plans.description: Applied automatically to existing seat contracts; no renegotiation required.

plans.name: Free
plans.description: The Free tier does not include Claude Code weekly limits, so this promotion does not apply.

platforms.title: Applies everywhere you use Claude Code

eligibility.note: Promotion runs through July 13, 2026 · 6:00 PM PDT (July 14, 1:00 AM GMT). It stacks with the 2x increase to 5-hour session limits announced May 6, 2026.

faq.title: QUESTIONS ANSWERED
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Claude Code weekly limits boost.

items.question: What's the +50% weekly limit boost?
items.answer: On May 13, 2026, Anthropic announced that Claude Code weekly limits are increasing by 50% for all Pro, Max, Team and seat-based Enterprise users. The boost is live now and applies automatically — no opt-in required.

items.question: When does the promotion end?
items.answer: The +50% boost runs through July 13, 2026 at 6:00 PM PDT (July 14, 1:00 AM GMT). After that, weekly limits are expected to return to their pre-promo baseline unless Anthropic announces otherwise.

items.question: Which plans get the boost?
items.answer: Pro, Max (5x and 20x), Team, and seat-based Enterprise. The Free tier is not included because it does not have Claude Code weekly limits.

items.question: Do I need to opt in?
items.answer: No. The 50% increase is already applied to every eligible account. Just keep using Claude Code as usual.

items.question: Does this stack with other recent changes?
items.answer: Yes. The +50% weekly boost stacks on top of the 2x increase to 5-hour session limits Anthropic shipped on May 6, 2026. Combined, both your hourly and weekly headroom are meaningfully higher than they were in early May.

items.question: What happened to the peak hours system?
items.answer: Anthropic removed the peak hours system entirely for Pro and Max on May 6, 2026. Session limits no longer drain faster on weekday afternoons. The previous system is archived in the Promotion History section below.

items.question: What about the March 2026 2x off-peak promotion?
items.answer: That promotion ran from March 13 to March 27, 2026 and ended on schedule. It is also archived in the Promotion History section below.

items.question: Where does this apply?
items.answer: Everywhere you use Claude Code — the CLI, IDE extensions (VS Code, JetBrains, etc.), desktop apps, and the web.

items.question: What is PromoClock?
items.answer: PromoClock is an independent tracker built by Onur Şendere (@onursendere on X) to help Claude users keep up with Anthropic's frequent limit and pricing changes. It is not affiliated with Anthropic.

promotionHistory.title: PROMOTION HISTORY
promotionHistory.subtitle: Past Claude promotions and limited-time systems.

items.title: Claude Peak Hours System
items.description: From March 27 to May 6, 2026, Claude session limits drained faster on weekdays 1pm–7pm UTC ("peak hours"). Anthropic removed this system entirely for Pro and Max on May 6, 2026, alongside doubling the 5-hour session limits.

items.title: Claude March 2026 Off-Peak Promotion
items.description: Anthropic ran a 2x session limits promotion during off-peak hours (outside weekdays 8 AM – 2 PM ET). Free, Pro, Max, and Team plans received doubled message and context limits during off-peak windows.
